landing_cta_note: Ready to use after signup · No credit card required
landing_faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about Price Eye's price comparison and alert features.
landing_faq_q1: Is Price Eye free to use?
landing_faq_a1: Yes. Price comparison, tracking, and drop alerts are all free on Price Eye. Just sign up — no payment required to start.
landing_faq_a2: Price Eye currently supports AliExpress products. Copy any product URL and paste it into Price Eye to start tracking its price automatically.
landing_faq_q3: How do I receive price alerts?
landing_faq_a3: When a tracked product's price drops, we send an email alert to your registered address. You can enable or disable alerts per product to focus on the items you care about.
landing_faq_q4: How do I set a target price?
landing_faq_a4: Open the product detail page, enable price alert, and enter your target price. The moment the price reaches or goes below your target, we send an instant alert.
landing_faq_a5: Prices for every tracked product are collected automatically every day and stored in the price history. Tracking continues in the background — no manual refresh needed.
landing_faq_q6: Can I track only specific product options (color or size)?
landing_faq_a6: Yes. For products with many variants, you can pick the exact color or size you want and track only that option's price. The detail page also shows a daily price trend chart for the selected option.
landing_faq_q7: Do I need to create an account?
landing_faq_a7: Yes, an account is required to save tracked products and receive price alerts. You can sign up with email or use Google, Kakao, or Naver single sign-on.
landing_faq_q8: Is there a limit to how many products I can track?
landing_faq_a8: Price Eye is designed to cover normal shopping usage comfortably. Abnormally large-scale additions may be limited to protect service stability.
landing_faq_q9: Can I see historical price changes?
landing_faq_a9: Yes. Each product detail page includes a daily price trend chart and a full change history, so you can see at a glance whether today's price is a good deal compared to the past.
landing_faq_q10: How is my personal information protected?
landing_faq_a10: Price Eye follows personal data protection regulations and collects only the minimum information needed to operate the service. We never sell your data to third parties, and all personal information is deleted within 30 days upon your request.

privacy_subtitle: Price Eye (the "Service") complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and related laws, and carefully protects users' personal information. This policy explains the information collected by the Service and how it is used.
privacy_summary_collect_desc: We only collect the minimum information necessary to operate the service.
privacy_summary_nosell_desc: We never sell or provide personal information to third parties without consent.
privacy_summary_delete_desc: Upon request, all personal information is deleted within 30 days.
